seoTitle: Reedy Lake vs Reefton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Reedy Lake and Reefton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Reedy Lake vs Reefton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Reedy Lake and Reefton.
heading: Reedy Lake vs Reefton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Reedy Lake, Victoria and Reefton, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Reefton has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Reedy Lake (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Reedy Lake or Reefton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Reedy Lake has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Reefton scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Reedy Lake scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Reefton scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Reedy Lake or Reefton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Reefton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
